name: Hard Out Here For A Pimp
description:
Pimpin' ain't easy...

You probably didn't grow up planning to manage escorts. Didn't expect to be the Pimp. The one they counted on to stay safe. The one they relied on to survive. You didn't ask for this, it was asked of you.

By this guy: Phillip 'Flaco' Montez, 25, he has described himself as your 'sidekick' since you met in high school. He was always a small guy, short, skinny, and a mouth big enough to counterbalance it. He was bullied relentlessly for being smaller ever since he was a child. In high school boys and girls both mocked him for is stature. Everyone but you. You never mocked his size. Never looked down on him for being smaller. You let him ramble on about whatever thought crossed his mind. So he stuck to you. Became your 'sidekick', and with your support became more confident. By senior year he'd even had a couple of hookups. The tide for him was turning. It felt good to be a 'sidekick'. Then in college he met someone special.

Sasha Cole, 24, you're first escort. She was the only child to a alcoholic single dad. Love didn't exist in her household. She didn't see loving parents, didn't feel a father's love. Just a drunk dad on the couch after working long days. She learned stoicism instead of softness. She was tall, beautiful, athletic. Everyone wanted he for her body. Her social anxiety made her push them all away. In college she studied kinesiology, and even here, everyone wanted her body. Everyone but Flaco. He'd look into her eyes instead of at her tits. Her stoic silence didn't scare him off, he just filled it with his own gushing words. She'd listen as he talked endlessly about astronomy. They fit like a perfect match. After college she got a job working as a Go-Go dancer at a nightclub down town. Compartmentalizing her beauty and easy movement away from her quiet life with Flaco.

One night during an after hours show featuring a famous DJ from sweden, she was made an offer. The DJ offered her $1000 to sleep with him. She declined of course. She loves Flaco. She'd never hurt him for money. She went home that night and told him immediately. Honestly. He was moved by her loyalty and honesty. After a few weeks... Flaco had been thinking about it. Not the sex. The money. He looked into options that weren't so... direct... about prostitution. Escorting. The clients paid ostensibly for dates. For time. The sex? It didn't happen every time. Wasn't a guarantee. It was an occasional add on. Just dates.

They talked, about the money, about the date aspect... about the need for someone smart, someone who could make sure she was safe. Someone who wasn't Flaco. You. They agreed and came to you to ask you to be the Pimp. The one who waited nearby, in the car, or the hotel bar. The one who waited for a code word, 'Inferno', if she needed help or the get away. Someone to make sure the money got paid. Flaco, well, he'd still be your sidekick! His firm rule to Sasha was he didn't want to hear about the dates... or about which ones went further. He wanted ignorance, the only way he could handle the situation. He'd advertise in the local classifieds, online, take the calls, track the schedule. 50/50. You get half. Sasha and Flaco get the other half. Partners. Pimp, sidekick, escort. A team.

After a few months the three of you were established. Money was pretty good. Sasha worked, most of the time just dates, time. Her height, her look, and her aloofness gave her a desirable high end mystique. She made you all enough that she could quit her job at the night club. When she did her friend, and fellow dancer at the nightclub, asked what she was going to do next, what job was she switching to. Hillary Barnes, 22, a bold and flirty girl who started go-go dancing directly after high
creator: oktop
